assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Food Delivery Order Status
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Location:
      type: object
      description: 'Geographical coordinates for real-time location tracking'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Latitude component of the location'
          example: 40.712776
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Longitude component of the location'
          example: -74.005974
    Courier:
      type: object
      description: 'Courier delivering the order with real-time location'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique courier identifier'
          example: 'courier_123'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the courier'
          example: 'Anna Smith'
        current_location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
    Restaurant:
      type: object
      description: 'Profile details of the restaurant fulfilling the order'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique restaurant identifier'
          example: 'rest_456'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the restaurant'
          example: 'The Green Spoon'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Physical address of the restaurant'
          example: '123 Garden St, New York, NY'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number of the restaurant'
          example: '+1-555-123-4567'
        cuisine:
          type: array
          description: 'List of cuisines the restaurant specializes in'
          items:
            type: string
          example: ['Vegan', 'Organic']
    OrderedDish:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a single dish ordered'
      properties:
        dish_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the dish'
          example: 'dish_001'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dish'
          example: 'Quinoa Salad'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantity ordered of this dish'
          example: 2
        price:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Price per unit of the dish'
          example: 12.5
        special_dietary_notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Special dietary notes or restrictions for the dish'
          example: 'Gluten-free, Vegan'
    OrderStatusResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Order status information including courier location, restaurant profile, and dishes ordered'
      properties:
        order_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique order identifier'
          example: 'order_98765'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current status of the order'
          example: 'Out for Delivery'
        courier:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Courier'
        restaurant:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Restaurant'
        ordered_dishes:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of ordered dishes with details'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderedDish'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Sistema de Exibição de Pedidos da Cozinha
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ItemPedido:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de um item pedido na cozinha'
      properties:
        item_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do item solicitado'
          example: 'Cheeseburger'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade do item pedido'
          example: 2
        special_instructions:
          type: string
          description: 'Instruções especiais para o preparo do item'
          example: 'No pickles'
    EstacaoPreparacao:
      type: object
      description: 'Grupo de itens agrupados pela estação de preparo'
      properties:
        station_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome da estação de preparo'
          example: 'Grill'
        items:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de itens que pertencem à estação'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ItemPedido'
    TicketPedido:
      type: object
      description: 'Representação completa do ticket de pedido para a cozinha'
      properties:
        table_number:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número da mesa que fez o pedido'
          example: 12
        stations:
          type: array
          description: 'Array das estações de preparo com seus itens pedidos'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/EstacaoPreparacao'
        allergy_warnings:
          type: array
          description: 'Avisos de alergias presentes no pedido'
          items:
            type: string
            description: 'Ingrediente ou alérgeno a ser evitado'
            example: 'gluten'
  schemas:
    # To ensure no duplicate keys in the YAML, redefine once
    ItemPedido: {}
    EstacaoPreparacao: {}
    TicketPedido: {}
paths: {}

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Food Delivery Order Status
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CourierLocation:
      type: object
      description: 'Real-time location data of the courier'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Latitude coordinate of the courier''s current position'
          example: 40.712776
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Longitude coordinate of the courier''s current position'
          example: -74.005974
        last_updated:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Timestamp noting when location was last updated'
          example: '2024-06-01T14:22:30Z'
    RestaurantProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Profile details of the restaurant fulfilling the order'
      properties:
        restaurant_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the restaurant'
          example: 'rest_556'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the restaurant'
          example: 'Green Garden'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Physical address of the restaurant'
          example: '123 Elm St, New York, NY'
        rating:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Average customer rating of the restaurant'
          example: 4.6
        cuisine_types:
          type: array
          description: 'List of cuisine categories the restaurant offers'
          items:
            type: string
          example: ['Vegan', 'Organic', 'Gluten-Free']
    OrderedDish:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of each ordered dish including quantity and special dietary notes'
      properties:
        dish_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the dish'
          example: 'dish_10'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dish'
          example: 'Quinoa Salad'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of portions ordered'
          example: 2
        special_notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Special dietary instructions or notes for the dish'
          example: 'No nuts, gluten-free'
    OrderStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Current order status including courier location, restaurant profile, and ordered items'
      properties:
        order_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier assigned to the order'
          example: 'ord_10234'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current state of the order'
          example: 'out_for_delivery'
        courier_location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/CourierLocation'
        restaurant:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/RestaurantProfile'
        ordered_dishes:
          type: array
          description: 'List of dishes included in the order'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderedDish'
  paths: {}

  schemas:

      type: object
      description: 'Details of an ordered item'
      properties:
        item_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the menu item'
          example: 'item_101'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the ordered dish'
          example: 'Cheeseburger'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of this item ordered'
          example: 2
        special_requests:
          type: string
          description: 'Any special preparation instructions for the item'
          example: 'No pickles'
        allergy_warnings:
          type: array
          description: 'List of allergy warnings related to this item'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/AllergyWarning'
    Station:
      type: object
      description: 'Preparation station grouping ordered items'
      properties:
        station_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the preparation station'
          example: 'Grill'
        items:
          type: array
          description: 'List of ordered items for this station'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderItem'
    KitchenTicket:
      type: object
      description: 'A restaurant kitchen display ticket with table and grouped orders'
      properties:
        table_number:

          description: 'Table number associated with the order'
          example: 12
        stations:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of preparation stations with their orders'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Station'
        allergy_warnings:
          type: array
          description: 'Complete list of allergy warnings for the ticket'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/AllergyWarning'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Smart City Traffic Camera Report
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    VehicleType:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações de um tipo de veículo detectado no cruzamento'
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Categoria do veículo detectado'
          example: 'car'
        count:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de veículos desse tipo presentes'
          example: 12
        average_speed_kmh:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Velocidade média dos veículos em km/h'
          example: 23.5
    PedestrianCrossingAlert:
      type: object
      description: 'Alerta ativo para uma faixa de pedestres'
      properties:
        crosswalk_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da faixa de pedestres'
          example: 'cw_12'
        is_active:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Estado atual do alerta da faixa de pedestres'
          example: true
        time_remaining_seconds:
          type: integer
          description: 'Tempo restante em segundos para o alerta ativo'
          example: 15
    TrafficCameraReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Relatório detalhado de uma câmera de tráfego em um cruzamento'
      properties:
        intersection_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do cruzamento monitorado'
          example: 'int_305'
        congestion_level:
          type: string
          description: 'Nível de congestionamento observado no cruzamento'
          example: 'high'
        detected_vehicles:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de tipos de veículos detectados no local'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/VehicleType'
        pedestrian_crossing_alerts:
          type: array
          description: 'Alertas ativos das faixas de pedestres no cruzamento'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PedestrianCrossingAlert'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Logistics Fleet Tracking API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Location:
      type: object
      description: 'GPS coordinates of the truck; latitude and longitude in decimal degrees'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Latitude coordinate'
          example: 40.712776
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Longitude coordinate'
          example: -74.005974
    Driver:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about the delivery truck driver'
      properties:
        driver_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the driver'
          example: 'drv_456'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the driver'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
        license_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Driver''s license number'
          example: 'D1234567'
    RouteStop:
      type: object
      description: 'A scheduled stop along the delivery route'
      properties:
        stop_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the stop'
          example: 'stop_1'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Physical address of the stop location'
          example: '123 Main St, New York, NY'
        scheduled_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Scheduled arrival time at the stop in ISO 8601 format'
          example: '2024-06-15T09:00:00Z'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current status of the stop (e.g., pending, completed)'
          example: 'completed'
    FleetTrackingResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response object containing current truck tracking details'
      properties:
        truck_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the delivery truck'
          example: 'truck_123'
        location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
        speed_kmph:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Current speed of the truck in kilometers per hour'
          example: 65.5
        driver:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Driver'
        route_stops:
          type: array
          description: 'List of stops in the truck''s delivery route'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/RouteStop'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Restaurant Reservation API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    DietaryRestrictions:
      type: object
      description: 'Customer dietary restrictions details'
      properties:
        vegetarian:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the customer is vegetarian'
          example: true
        allergies:
          type: array
          description: 'List of food allergies the customer has'
          items:
            type: string
            example: 'nuts'
    Customer:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about the customer'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the customer'
          example: 'John Doe'
        dietary_restrictions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DietaryRestrictions'
    PreOrderedItem:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about an item pre-ordered by the customer'
      properties:
        item_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the pre-ordered menu item'
          example: 'Garden Salad'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of units ordered for this item'
          example: 2
        special_instructions:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional preparation instructions for the item'
          example: 'No dressing'
    ReservationResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response schema for a restaurant reservation with pre-ordered items and dietary restrictions'
      properties:
        table_number:
          type: integer
          description: 'Assigned table number for the reservation'
          example: 12
        customer:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Customer'
        pre_ordered_items:
          type: array
          description: 'List of items pre-ordered by the customer'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreOrderedItem'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Relatório de Análise de Usuários da Plataforma SaaS
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    SubFeatureUsage:
      type: object
      description: 'Parâmetros de uso para um sub-recurso do recurso'
      properties:
        sub_feature_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do sub-recurso em uso'
          example: 'Widgets'
        usage_count:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de vezes que o sub-recurso foi utilizado'
          example: 4567
    FeatureUsage:
      type: object
      description: 'Métricas de uso para um recurso principal'
      properties:
        feature_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do recurso na plataforma'
          example: 'Dashboard'
        usage_count:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número total de usos do recurso'
          example: 7845
        average_session_duration_minutes:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Duração média da sessão no recurso em minutos'
          example: 12.4
        sub_features:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de métricas para sub-recursos relacionados'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/SubFeatureUsage'
    AccountSubscription:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre o plano de assinatura da conta'
      properties:
        tier_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do nível do plano de assinatura'
          example: 'Pro'
        monthly_limit:
          type: integer
          description: 'Limite mensal de uso permitido no plano'
          example: 50000
        features_included:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de recursos incluídos no plano de assinatura'
          items:
            type: string
          example: ['Dashboard', 'Messaging', 'Analytics']
    UserAnalyticsReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Relatório diário de análise de usuários da plataforma SaaS'
      properties:
        daily_active_users:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de usuários ativos no dia'
          example: 12456
        feature_usage_metrics:
          type: array
          description: 'Métricas de uso detalhadas por recurso'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/FeatureUsage'
        account_subscription:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AccountSubscription'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Real Estate Property Listing API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ArchitecturalSpecs:
      type: object
      description: 'Architectural specifications of the property'
      properties:
        area_sq_ft:
          type: integer
          description: 'Total area of the property in square feet'
          example: 3500
        num_bedrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of bedrooms in the property'
          example: 4
        num_bathrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of bathrooms in the property'
          example: 3
        year_built:
          type: integer
          description: 'Year in which the property was built'
          example: 2018
        has_garage:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the property has a garage'
          example: true
        roof_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of the roofing on the property'
          example: 'Gable'
        flooring_materials:
          type: array
          description: 'List of flooring materials used in the property'
          items:
            type: string
            description: 'Type of flooring material'
            example: 'Hardwood'
    Image:
      type: object
      description: 'High-resolution image information for the property'
      properties:
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL to the high-resolution image'
          example: 'https://realestate.example.com/images/property12345_front.jpg'
        resolution:
          type: string
          description: 'Image resolution in pixels (width x height)'
          example: '4000x3000'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Description of the image content'
          example: 'Front view of the house'
    Realtor:
      type: object
      description: 'Contact information for the assigned realtor'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the realtor'
          example: 'realtor_67890'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the realtor'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Email address of the realtor'
          example: 'jane.doe@realestateagency.com'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number for the realtor'
          example: '+1-800-555-1234'
        agency:
          type: string
          description: 'Real estate agency the realtor belongs to'
          example: 'Dream Homes Realty'
    Property:
      type: object
      description: 'Real estate property listing details'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the property'
          example: 'prop_12345'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title of the property listing'
          example: 'Spacious Modern Family Home'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Detailed description of the property'
          example: 'A beautiful 4-bedroom house with a large garden and pool, located in the suburbs.'
        architectural_specs:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ArchitecturalSpecs'
        images:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of high-resolution images for the property'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Image'
        realtor:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Realtor'
    PropertyListingResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response containing property listing details'
      properties:
        property:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Property'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Smart City Traffic Camera Report
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    VehicleDetected:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about a detected vehicle type and its count'
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of the detected vehicle'
          example: 'Car'
        count:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of detected vehicles of this type'
          example: 15
    PedestrianCrossingAlert:
      type: object
      description: 'Alert information for a pedestrian crosswalk'
      properties:
        crosswalk_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier for the pedestrian crosswalk'
          example: 'cw_12'
        alert_active:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the pedestrian crossing alert is currently active'
          example: true
        time_remaining_sec:
          type: integer
          description: 'Time remaining for the alert in seconds'
          example: 25
    TrafficCameraReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Report from a smart city traffic camera showing congestion, detected vehicles, and pedestrian crossing alerts'
      properties:
        intersection_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the intersection'
          example: 'int_45'
        congestion_level:
          type: string
          description: 'Traffic congestion level at the intersection'
          example: 'High'
        vehicles_detected:
          type: array
          description: 'List of detected vehicle types and their counts'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/VehicleDetected'
        pedestrian_crossing_alerts:
          type: array
          description: 'List of pedestrian crossing alerts at the intersection'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PedestrianCrossingAlert'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Fintech Digital Wallet Statement
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    UserProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes do perfil do usuário da carteira digital'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do usuário'
          example: 'usr_2391'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do usuário'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Endereço de e-mail do usuário'
          example: 'carlos.silva@example.com'
        phone_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número de telefone do usuário com código do país'
          example: '+5511998765432'
    Transaction:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de uma transação financeira recente'
      properties:
        transaction_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da transação'
          example: 'txn_1001'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Data e hora da transação no formato ISO 8601'
          example: '2024-06-15T14:23:30Z'
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Tipo de transação: débito ou crédito'
          example: 'debit'
        amount:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Valor da transação'
          example: 250.00
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'Código da moeda em formato ISO 4217'
          example: 'BRL'
        merchant:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do estabelecimento ou origem da transação'
          example: 'Supermarket'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Descrição detalhada da transação'
          example: 'Grocery shopping'
    WalletStatement:
      type: object
      description: 'Extrato da carteira digital mostrando saldo e transações recentes'
      properties:
        user_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserProfile'
        current_balance:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Saldo atual disponível na carteira digital'
          example: 1540.75
        recent_transactions:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista das últimas transações realizadas na carteira'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Transaction'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: University Student Dashboard
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    PersonalInfo:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações pessoais do estudante'
      properties:
        first_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Primeiro nome do estudante'
          example: 'Lucas'
        last_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Sobrenome do estudante'
          example: 'Silva'
        birth_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data de nascimento do estudante'
          example: '2001-08-17'
    CompletedCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'Curso concluído pelo estudante'
      properties:
        course_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do curso'
          example: 'MAT101'
        course_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do curso concluído'
          example: 'Calculus I'
        grade:
          type: string
          description: 'Nota obtida no curso'
          example: 'A'
        year_completed:
          type: integer
          description: 'Ano em que o curso foi concluído'
          example: 2022
    AcademicHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Histórico acadêmico do estudante'
      properties:
        completed_courses:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de cursos finalizados'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CompletedCourse'
        gpa:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Média geral ponderada do estudante'
          example: 3.75
    CurrentEnrollment:
      type: object
      description: 'Curso atualmente matriculado'
      properties:
        course_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador do curso'
          example: 'CSC200'
        course_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do curso em andamento'
          example: 'Data Structures'
        instructor:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do instrutor do curso'
          example: 'Prof. Ana Costa'
        credits:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de créditos do curso'
          example: 4
    FinancialStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Status financeiro do estudante referente à matrícula'
      properties:
        tuition_due:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Valor devido para as mensalidades'
          example: 1500.00
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data limite para pagamento'
          example: '2024-07-05'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Status atual do pagamento das mensalidades'
          example: 'Partial Payment'
    StudentDashboard:
      type: object
      description: 'Resumo completo do dashboard do estudante'
      properties:
        student_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do estudante'
          example: '20230456'
        personal_info:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PersonalInfo'
        academic_history:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AcademicHistory'
        current_enrollments:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de cursos em que o estudante está matriculado atualmente'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CurrentEnrollment'
        financial_status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialStatus'
paths: {}

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Student Dashboard
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Degree:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de uma titulação acadêmica obtida pelo estudante'
      properties:
        degree_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do diploma ou grau acadêmico'
          example: 'Bacharelado em Ciência da Computação'
        year_completed:
          type: integer
          description: 'Ano de conclusão do grau'
          example: 2022
        gpa:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Média ponderada das notas obtidas no curso (escala 0-10)'
          example: 8.7
    AcademicHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Histórico acadêmico do estudante contendo graus obtidos'
      properties:
        degrees:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de diplomas conquistados pelo estudante'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Degree'
    Course:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações detalhadas de um curso atualmente matriculado'
      properties:
        course_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Código único do curso'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: API de Filme para Plataforma de Streaming
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Diretor:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre o diretor do filme'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do diretor'
          example: 'Christopher Nolan'
        birth_year:
          type: integer
          description: 'Ano de nascimento do diretor'
          example: 1970
    MembroDoElenco:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de um membro do elenco'
      properties:
        actor_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do ator'
          example: 'Leonardo DiCaprio'
        character_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do personagem interpretado'
          example: 'Dom Cobb'
    LinkHATEOAS:
      type: object
      description: 'Link HATEOAS para navegação relacionada ao recurso'
      properties:
        rel:
          type: string
          description: 'Tipo ou relação do link em relação ao recurso atual'
          example: 'self'
        href:
          type: string
          description: 'URL do recurso referenciado'
          example: 'https://api.streaming.com/movies/123'
    Filme:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações completas de um filme'
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Título do filme'
          example: 'Inception'
        runtime_minutes:
          type: integer
          description: 'Duração do filme em minutos'
          example: 148
        director:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Diretor'
        cast:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista dos membros do elenco do filme'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MembroDoElenco'
        links:
          type: array
          description: 'Links HATEOAS relacionados ao filme'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinkHATEOAS'

  title: Smart Agriculture Sensor Response

      properties:
        event_id:

          description: 'Unique identifier for the irrigation event'

          type: array
          description: 'List of recent automated irrigation events'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Dental Clinic Patient History API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ToothChart:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a specific tooth and its condition'
      properties:
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Number identifier of the tooth according to dental charting system'
          example: '12'
        surface:
          type: string
          description: 'Specific surface of the tooth affected or noted'
          example: 'occlusal'
        condition:
          type: string
          description: 'Condition found on the tooth surface'
          example: 'cavity'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional notes regarding the tooth condition'
          example: 'small cavity detected on occlusal surface'
    PastProcedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a dental procedure performed in the past'
      properties:
        procedure_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the dental procedure'
          example: 'proc_001'
        procedure_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name or type of the dental procedure'
          example: 'Dental Filling'
        date_performed:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the procedure was performed'
          example: '2023-10-12'
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: 'Tooth number on which the procedure was performed, null if not applicable'
          example: '12'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional notes about the procedure'
          example: 'Composite resin filling on tooth 12'
    UpcomingCleaningsMeta:
      type: object
      description: 'Metadata about upcoming scheduled dental cleanings'
      properties:
        next_scheduled_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date of the next scheduled cleaning appointment'
          example: '2024-07-01'
        reminder_sent:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicator if a reminder has been sent to the patient'
          example: true
        cleaning_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of cleaning scheduled'
          example: 'routine'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional notes regarding upcoming cleaning'
          example: 'Patient requested afternoon appointment'
    PatientHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Overall patient history including tooth chart, past procedures, and upcoming cleaning metadata'
      properties:
        tooth_chart:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothChart'
        past_procedures:
          type: array
          description: 'List of all past dental procedures'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PastProcedure'
        upcoming_cleanings_meta:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleaningsMeta'
    PatientHistoryResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Root response object containing patient history data'
      properties:
        patient_history:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PatientHistory'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Dental Clinic Patient History
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ToothChart:
      type: object
      description: 'Mapping of tooth positions to their current conditions'
      properties:
        tooth_11:
          type: string
          description: 'Condition of tooth number 11'
          example: 'healthy'
        tooth_12:
          type: string
          description: 'Condition of tooth number 12'
          example: 'filled'
        tooth_13:
          type: string
          description: 'Condition of tooth number 13'
          example: 'missing'
        tooth_14:
          type: string
          description: 'Condition of tooth number 14'
          example: 'cavity'
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a dental procedure performed on the patient'
      properties:
        procedure_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the dental procedure'
          example: 'proc_001'
        procedure_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dental procedure'
          example: 'Filling'
        date_performed:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the procedure was performed'
          example: '2023-05-20'
        tooth_involved:
          type: string
          description: 'Tooth identifier affected by the procedure'
          example: 'tooth_12'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional notes about the procedure'
          example: 'Composite resin used'
    CleaningMetadata:
      type: object
      description: 'Additional information related to the upcoming cleaning appointment'
      properties:
        reminder_sent:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if a reminder has been sent to the patient'
          example: true
        reminder_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the cleaning reminder was sent'
          example: '2024-07-01'
        notes:
          type: string

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Patient:
      type: object
      description: 'Demographic information of the patient'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the patient'
          example: '123456'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the patient'
          example: 'John Doe'
        age:
          type: integer
          description: 'Age of the patient in years'
          example: 45
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Biological gender of the patient'
          example: 'Male'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Normal reference range for a biomarker'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Minimum normal value'
          example: 13.5
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Maximum normal value'
          example: 17.5
    BloodBiomarker:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a specific blood biomarker'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the blood biomarker'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Measured value of the biomarker'
          example: 14.2
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Measurement unit of the biomarker value'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    ReviewingPathologist:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of the pathologist reviewing the test'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the reviewing pathologist'
          example: 'Dr. Alice Smith'
        digital_signature:
          type: string
          description: 'Digital signature of the pathologist in hexadecimal format'
          example: '3045022100dff9a3ab7eda7d4f41c4638bab8a3aefb4033ddc1b49a4f0a927a25b29096e9c02205e38f38914a5a1b6b53e587083916aa8ec3b2a467a79e9f465bbfac6e3a7a30f'
    LabTestResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete laboratory test result including patient data, blood biomarkers, and pathologist review'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Patient'
        blood_biomarkers:
          type: array
          description: 'List of blood biomarkers with their values and normal ranges'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/BloodBiomarker'
        reviewing_pathologist:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReviewingPathologist'

          description: 'Duração da faixa em segundos'

          format: date
          description: 'Data do show'

          type: string
          description: 'Cidade onde o show acontecerá'
          example: 'São Paulo'
        venue:
          type: string
          description: 'Local do show'
          example: 'Espaço das Américas'
    UpcomingTour:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações da turnê de shows futura'
      properties:
        tour_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome da turnê'

          description: 'Lista de datas e locais da turnê'
          items:

      description: 'Perfil completo do artista com biografia, faixas top e turnê'

          description: 'Nome do artista'

        biography:

          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Track'
        upcoming_tour:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingTour'
    RootResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta contendo o perfil do artista'
      properties:
        artist_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ArtistProfile'

  schemas:

          type: integer
          description: 'Total number of times the feature was used during the day'

          description: 'Number of unique users who used the feature during the day'

          type: string
          description: 'Subscription tier name'
          example: 'Pro'
        max_projects:
          type: integer
          description: 'Maximum number of projects allowed under the subscription'
          example: 50
        max_storage_gb:
          type: integer
          description: 'Maximum storage capacity in gigabytes for the subscription'
          example: 1000
    UserAnalyticsReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Daily analytics report for user activity and subscription limits'
      properties:
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date for which the report applies'
          example: '2024-04-25'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Streaming Platform Movie Endpoint
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Director:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre o diretor do filme'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do diretor'
          example: 'Christopher Nolan'
        birth_year:
          type: integer
          description: 'Ano de nascimento do diretor'
          example: 1970
        nationality:
          type: string
          description: 'Nacionalidade do diretor'
          example: 'British-American'
    CastMember:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de um membro do elenco'
      properties:
        actor_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do ator ou atriz'
          example: 'Leonardo DiCaprio'
        character_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do personagem interpretado'
          example: 'Dom Cobb'
    Link:
      type: object
      description: 'Link HATEOAS para navegação'
      properties:
        href:
          type: string
          description: 'URL do recurso relacionado'
          example: '/movies/inception'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Título do recurso relacionado'
          example: 'Interstellar'
    Links:
      type: object
      description: 'Coleção de links HATEOAS para o recurso'
      properties:
        self:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Link'
        related_movies:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de filmes relacionados como links'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Link'
    Movie:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes do filme na plataforma de streaming'
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Título do filme'
          example: 'Inception'
        runtime_minutes:
          type: integer
          description: 'Duração do filme em minutos'
          example: 148
        director:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Director'
        cast:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista dos membros do elenco'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CastMember'
        _links:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Links'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Real Estate Property Listing API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ArchitecturalSpecs:
      type: object
      description: 'Architectural specifications of the property'
      properties:
        yearBuilt:
          type: integer
          description: 'Year the property was built'
          example: 2020
        squareFeet:
          type: integer
          description: 'Total living area in square feet'
          example: 3500
        numBedrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of bedrooms'
          example: 4
        numBathrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of bathrooms'
          example: 3
        flooring:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of flooring used in the property'
          example: 'Hardwood'
        heating:
          type: string
          description: 'Heating system description'
          example: 'Central'
        cooling:
          type: string
          description: 'Cooling system description'
          example: 'Central Air'
    Image:
      type: object
      description: 'High-resolution image details for the property'
      properties:
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'Direct URL to the image resource'
          example: 'https://example.com/images/prop_12345/front_view.jpg'
        resolution:
          type: string
          description: 'Image resolution in width x height format'
          example: '4000x3000'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Brief description of the image content'
          example: 'Front elevation showing modern facade'
    Realtor:
      type: object
      description: 'Contact information for the realtor assigned to the property'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the realtor'
          example: 'realtor_6789'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the realtor'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number for the realtor'
          example: '+1-555-123-4567'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Email address of the realtor'
          example: 'jane.doe@example.com'
        agency:
          type: string
          description: 'Real estate agency name'
          example: 'Oceanview Realty'
    Property:
      type: object
      description: 'Real estate property listing including specs, images, and realtor info'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique property identifier'
          example: 'prop_12345'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title summarizing the property'
          example: 'Modern Family Home with Ocean View'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Detailed description of the property'
          example: 'A beautiful 4-bedroom modern house overlooking the ocean.'
        price:
          type: integer
          description: 'Listing price in USD'
          example: 950000
        architecturalSpecs:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ArchitecturalSpecs'
        images:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of high-resolution images related to the property'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Image'
        realtor:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Realtor'
    PropertyListingResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response object containing the property listing'
      properties:
        property:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Property'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Digital Wallet Statement
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    UserProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes do perfil do usuário'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do usuário'
          example: 'user_12345'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do usuário'
          example: 'João Silva'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Endereço de e-mail do usuário'
          example: 'joao.silva@example.com'
        phone_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número de telefone do usuário com código do país'
          example: '+5511999998888'
    Transaction:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de uma transação financeira'
      properties:
        transaction_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da transação'
          example: 'tx1001'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Data e hora da transação em formato ISO 8601'
          example: '2024-06-20T14:12:00Z'
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Tipo da transação: crédito ou débito'
          example: 'credit'
        amount:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Valor monetário da transação'
          example: 500.00
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'Código da moeda em formato ISO 4217'
          example: 'BRL'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Descrição ou título da transação'
          example: 'Depósito via transferência bancária'
    WalletStatement:
      type: object
      description: 'Resumo da carteira digital contendo saldo e transações recentes'
      properties:
        user_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserProfile'
        current_balance:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Saldo atual disponível na carteira digital'
          example: 1520.75
        recent_transactions:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista das últimas 3 transações realizadas'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Transaction'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Veterinary Clinic Appointment Response
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of the scheduled veterinary procedure'
      properties:
        procedure_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique code identifying the procedure'
          example: 'PROC789'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Description of the procedure to be performed'
          example: 'Annual Vaccination'
        duration_minutes:
          type: integer
          description: 'Expected duration of the procedure in minutes'
          example: 30
    Pet:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about the pet scheduled for the appointment'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the pet'
          example: 'Buddy'
        species:
          type: string
          description: 'Species of the pet'
          example: 'Dog'
        breed:
          type: string
          description: 'Breed of the pet'
          example: 'Golden Retriever'
        weight_kg:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Weight of the pet in kilograms'
          example: 30.5
        age_years:
          type: integer
          description: 'Age of the pet in years'
          example: 5
    Contact:
      type: object
      description: 'Contact information for the owner'
      properties:
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Email address of the owner'
          example: 'jane.doe@example.com'
        phone_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Phone number of the owner'
          example: '+1234567890'
    Owner:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about the pet owner'
      properties:
        owner_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the owner'
          example: 'OWN4321'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the owner'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        contact:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Contact'
    AppointmentResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response containing appointment details including pet, owner, and procedure information'
      properties:
        appointment_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the appointment'
          example: 'APT123456'
        scheduled_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Scheduled date and time for the appointment in ISO 8601 format'
          example: '2024-07-15T14:30:00Z'
        procedure:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Procedure'
        pet:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
        owner:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Owner'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Digital Wallet Statement
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    UserProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of the user profile'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the user'
          example: 'usr_789'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Email address of the user'
          example: 'jane.doe@example.com'
        phone_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number of the user'
          example: '+1234567890'
    Merchant:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about the merchant involved in a transaction'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the merchant'
          example: 'Fresh Market'
        category:
          type: string
          description: 'Business category of the merchant'
          example: 'Groceries'
        location:
          type: string
          description: 'Physical or online location of the merchant'
          example: '123 Main St, Anytown'
    Transaction:
      type: object
      description: 'Single transaction record in the wallet statement'
      properties:
        transaction_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the transaction'
          example: 'tx_001'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'ISO 8601 date and time when the transaction occurred'
          example: '2024-06-15T14:20:00Z'
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of the transaction, debit or credit'
          example: 'debit'
        amount:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Amount of money involved in the transaction'
          example: 120.00
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'Currency code of the transaction amount'
          example: 'USD'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Brief description or memo for the transaction'
          example: 'Grocery shopping'
        merchant:
          oneOf:
            - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Merchant'
            - type: 'null'
          description: 'Merchant information if applicable, null otherwise'
          example: {"name": "Fresh Market", "category": "Groceries", "location": "123 Main St, Anytown"}
    DigitalWalletStatement:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital wallet statement including user profile, balance, and recent transactions'
      properties:
        current_balance:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Current balance in the digital wallet'
          example: 4520.75
        user_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserProfile'
        recent_transactions:
          type: array
          description: 'List of the most recent transactions'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Transaction'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Digital Wallet Statement API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    UserProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of the user profile'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the user'
          example: 'user_12345'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Email address of the user'
          example: 'alice.johnson@example.com'
    Transaction:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a wallet transaction'
      properties:
        transaction_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the transaction'
          example: 'txn_001'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'ISO 8601 date and time of the transaction'
          example: '2024-06-10T14:23:00Z'
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of transaction, either debit or credit'
          example: 'debit'
        amount:
          type: number
          description: 'Transaction amount'
          example: 150.0
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'Currency code in ISO 4217 format'
          example: 'USD'
        merchant:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the merchant or source of transaction'
          example: 'Amazon'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current status of the transaction'
          example: 'completed'
    DigitalWalletStatement:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital wallet statement including balance, user profile, and recent transactions'
      properties:
        user_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserProfile'
        current_balance:
          type: number
          description: 'Current balance in the digital wallet'
          example: 2540.75
        recent_transactions:
          type: array
          description: 'List of the last three recent transactions'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Transaction'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Fintech Digital Wallet Statement
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Merchant:
      type: object
      description: 'Merchant information related to a transaction'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Merchant or payee name'
          example: 'Whole Foods'
        category:
          type: string
          description: 'Category of the merchant or service'
          example: 'Groceries'
    Transaction:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a single wallet transaction'
      properties:
        transaction_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the transaction'
          example: 'tx1001'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'ISO 8601 date and time of the transaction'
          example: '2024-06-15T14:20:30Z'
        amount:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Transaction amount; negative for debit, positive for credit'
          example: -150.25
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'Currency code following ISO 4217'
          example: 'USD'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Short description or memo for the transaction'
          example: 'Grocery Shopping'
        merchant:
          oneOf:
            - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Merchant'
            - type: 'null'
          description: 'Optional merchant info if applicable'
          example:
            name: 'Whole Foods'
            category: 'Groceries'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current processing status of the transaction'
          example: 'Completed'
    UserProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Profile information of the wallet user'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the user'
          example: 'user_987'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Email address of the user'
          example: 'jane.doe@example.com'
        phone_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number of the user'
          example: '+1234567890'
    WalletStatement:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital wallet statement with balance, user profile, and recent transactions'
      properties:
        current_balance:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Current balance available in the digital wallet'
          example: 2540.75
        user_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserProfile'
        recent_transactions:
          type: array
          description: 'List of the last three recent transactions in the wallet'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Transaction'

info:
  title: Digital News Article Response Schema
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Dimensions:
      type: object
      description: 'Physical dimensions of an image asset in pixels'
      properties:
        width:
          type: integer
          description: 'Width of the image in pixels'
          example: 1920
        height:
          type: integer
          description: 'Height of the image in pixels'
          example: 1080
    MultimediaAsset:
      type: object
      description: 'An embedded multimedia asset such as image or video'
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of multimedia asset'
          example: 'image'
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL pointing to the multimedia content'
          example: 'https://news.example.com/assets/solar_panel.jpg'
        caption:
          type: string
          description: 'Caption describing the multimedia asset'
          example: 'Solar panels harnessing energy'
        dimensions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Dimensions'
          description: 'Dimensions for image assets only'
        duration_seconds:
          type: integer
          description: 'Duration in seconds for video assets'
          example: 360
    ArticleResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response schema for a digital news publication article'
      properties:
        headline:
          type: string
          description: 'Title headline of the article'
          example: 'Breakthrough in Renewable Energy Technologies'
        author_byline:
          type: string
          description: 'Author byline of the article'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        multimedia_assets:
          type: array
          description: 'List of embedded multimedia assets in the article'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MultimediaAsset'
        related_tags:
          type: array
          description: 'Tags related to the article topic'
          items:
            type: string
            example: 'Renewable Energy'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Food Delivery Order Status
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    RealTimeLocation:
      type: object
      description: 'Current geographic coordinates and the last update timestamp of the courier''s location'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Latitude of the courier''s current location'
          example: 40.712776
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Longitude of the courier''s current location'
          example: -74.005974
        last_updated:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Timestamp of the last location update in ISO 8601 format'
          example: '2024-06-15T14:23:30Z'
    Courier:
      type: object
      description: 'Delivery courier details including real-time location'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the courier'
          example: 'cr_987'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the courier'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
        real_time_location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/RealTimeLocation'
    Restaurant:
      type: object
      description: 'Profile of the restaurant fulfilling the order'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique restaurant identifier'
          example: 'rest_456'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the restaurant'
          example: 'Green Garden'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Physical address of the restaurant'
          example: '123 Veggie Lane, New York, NY 10001'
        contact_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number of the restaurant'
          example: '+1-212-555-0199'
    OrderedDish:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a single dish ordered including dietary notes'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique dish identifier'
          example: 'dish_101'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the ordered dish'
          example: 'Quinoa Salad'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of portions ordered'
          example: 2
        dietary_notes:
          type: array
          description: 'List of special dietary tags for the dish'
          items:
            type: string
          example: ['Gluten-Free', 'Vegan']
    OrderStatusResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete order status response with courier location, restaurant info, and ordered dishes'
      properties:
        order_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique order identifier'
          example: 'ord_12345'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current status of the order'
          example: 'Out for delivery'
        courier:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Courier'
        restaurant:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Restaurant'
        ordered_dishes:
          type: array
          description: 'List of dishes included in the order'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderedDish'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: University Student Dashboard Response
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CompletedCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a course completed by the student'
      properties:
        course_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Code identifier of the completed course'
          example: 'CS101'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the completed course'
          example: 'Introduction to Computer Science'
        grade:
          type: string
          description: 'Final grade received in the course'
          example: 'A'
        semester:
          type: string
          description: 'Academic semester when the course was completed'
          example: 'Fall 2022'
    AcademicHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Academic record including completed courses and GPA'
      properties:
        completed_courses:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of courses the student has completed'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CompletedCourse'
        gpa:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Grade point average'
          example: 3.75
    CurrentCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a currently enrolled course'
      properties:
        course_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Code identifier of the course'
          example: 'PHY301'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title of the current course'
          example: 'Physics III'
        credits:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of credits the course carries'
          example: 4
        instructor:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the course instructor'
          example: 'Dr. John Smith'
        schedule:
          type: string
          description: 'Weekly schedule timing of the course'
          example: 'Mon/Wed 10:00-11:30'
    FinancialStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Information regarding the student''s tuition payment status'
      properties:
        tuition_due:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Outstanding tuition amount to be paid'
          example: 1200.50
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Due date for the tuition payment'
          example: '2024-07-01'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current payment status'
          example: 'Pending'
    StudentDashboardResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete response object for a university student dashboard'
      properties:
        student_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the student'
          example: 'stu_2023001'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the student'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
        academic_history:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AcademicHistory'
        current_courses:
          type: array
          description: 'List of courses in which the student is currently enrolled'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CurrentCourse'
        financial_status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialStatus'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Student Progress Report API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    QuizScore:
      type: object
      description: 'Individual quiz score details'
      properties:
        quiz_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the quiz'
          example: 'quiz_01'
        score:
          type: integer
          description: 'Score obtained by the student in the quiz'
          example: 85
        max_score:
          type: integer
          description: 'Maximum possible score for the quiz'
          example: 100
    Certificate:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a digital certificate unlocked by the student'
      properties:
        certificate_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the certificate'
          example: 'cert_001'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title of the certificate'
          example: 'Introduction to Python'
        issued_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the certificate was issued'
          example: '2024-03-15'
    StudentProgressReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Progress report of a student for a specific course'
      properties:
        student_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the student'
          example: 'stu_12345'
        course_progress:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Percentage of course completed by the student'
          example: 76.5
        quiz_scores:
          type: array
          description: 'List of quiz scores for the student'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/QuizScore'
        certificates:
          type: array
          description: 'Digital certificates unlocked by the student'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Certificate'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Cloud Infrastructure Billing Dashboard
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CostDetail:
      type: object
      description: 'Detailed cost information for a specific resource type within a service'
      properties:
        resource_type:
          type: string
          description: 'The type of cloud resource incurring cost'
          example: 'virtual_machine'
        cost:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Cost associated with the resource type in USD'
          example: 5000.25
    ServiceCostBreakdown:
      type: object
      description: 'Cost breakdown of a service including detailed costs per resource type'
      properties:
        service_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the cloud service'
          example: 'compute'
        monthly_cost:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Total monthly cost for the service in USD'
          example: 8200.50
        details:
          type: array
          description: 'Detailed costs broken down by resource type within the service'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CostDetail'
    ProjectedForecast:
      type: object
      description: 'Forecasted billing information for upcoming month'
      properties:
        next_month_estimate:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Estimated total spend for the next month in USD'
          example: 13000.00
        trend_percentage:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Percentage change in spend compared to the current month'
          example: 4.46
    BillingDashboard:
      type: object
      description: 'Summary of cloud infrastructure billing dashboard showing current spend, breakdown, and forecast'
      properties:
        total_monthly_spend:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Total cloud spend in the current month in USD'
          example: 12450.75
        cost_breakdown:
          type: array
          description: 'Breakdown of monthly costs by cloud service'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ServiceCostBreakdown'
        projected_forecast:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProjectedForecast'
