assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Dental Clinic Patient History
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ToothStatus:
      type: string
      description: 'Condition status of a specific tooth'
      example: 'Healthy'
    ToothChart:
      type: object
      description: 'Anatomical chart showing conditions of individual teeth by tooth number'
      properties:
        tooth_11:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothStatus'
        tooth_12:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothStatus'
        tooth_13:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothStatus'
        tooth_21:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothStatus'
        tooth_22:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothStatus'
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a past dental procedure'
      properties:
        procedure_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the procedure'
          example: 'PROC001'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dental procedure performed'
          example: 'Root Canal'
        tooth:
          type: string
          description: 'The tooth number involved in the procedure'
          example: '12'
        date_performed:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the procedure was performed'
          example: '2023-11-15'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional notes relating to the procedure'
          example: 'Successful treatment with no complications.'
    ProceduresArray:
      type: array
      description: 'List of past dental procedures'
      items:
        $ref: '#/components/schemas/Procedure'
    CleaningMetadata:
      type: object
      description: 'Nested metadata for upcoming dental cleaning reminders and instructions'
      properties:
        reminder_method:
          type: string
          description: 'Method used to send cleaning reminders'
          example: 'email'
        reminder_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the reminder was sent'
          example: '2024-09-01'
        special_instructions:
          type: string
          description: 'Any special instructions for the upcoming cleaning'
          example: 'Patient requested fluoride treatment during cleaning.'
    UpcomingCleanings:
      type: object
      description: 'Details for the patient\'s upcoming cleaning appointment'
      properties:
        next_cleaning_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Scheduled date for the next cleaning'
          example: '2024-09-10'
        location:
          type: string
          description: 'Location within the clinic where cleaning will occur'
          example: 'Clinic Room 3'
        reminder_sent:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Flag indicating if a reminder has been sent'
          example: true
        metadata:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/CleaningMetadata'
    PatientHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete patient dental history with tooth chart, past procedures, and upcoming cleaning details'
      properties:
        patient_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the patient'
          example: 'PT123456'
        tooth_chart:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothChart'
        past_procedures:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProceduresArray'
        upcoming_cleanings:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleanings'
paths: {}

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Dental Patient History
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    AnatomicalToothChart:
      type: object
      description: 'Descrição anatômica e condição do dente do paciente'
      properties:
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número do dente conforme nomenclatura dental'
          example: '18'
        condition:
          type: string
          description: 'Condição atual do dente'
          example: 'Cavity'
        last_exam_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data do último exame realizado no dente'
          example: '2024-05-10'
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de um procedimento odontológico passado'
      properties:
        procedure_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do procedimento'
          example: 'proc_001'
        procedure_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do procedimento realizado'
          example: 'Filling'
        date_performed:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data em que o procedimento foi realizado'
          example: '2023-11-20'
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: 'Número do dente onde o procedimento foi realizado, se aplicável'
          example: '18'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Observações adicionais sobre o procedimento'
          example: 'Composite resin used'
    Reminder:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes do lembrete para limpeza agendada'
      properties:
        sent:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o lembrete foi enviado'
          example: true
        method:
          type: string
          description: 'Método utilizado para enviar o lembrete'
          example: 'email'
    UpcomingCleanings:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre limpezas futuras agendadas'
      properties:
        next_cleaning_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data da próxima limpeza agendada'
          example: '2024-07-01'
        reminder:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Reminder'
    PatientHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Histórico completo do paciente odontológico'
      properties:
        patient_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do paciente'
          example: '12345'
        anatomical_tooth_chart:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AnatomicalToothChart'
        past_procedures:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de procedimentos odontológicos realizados no passado'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Procedure'
        upcoming_cleanings:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleanings'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Food Delivery Order Status
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    RealTimeLocation:
      type: object
      description: 'The courier''s current geographic location with a timestamp'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Latitude coordinate of the courier''s location'
          example: 40.712776
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: 'Longitude coordinate of the courier''s location'
          example: -74.005974
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Timestamp when the location was recorded'
          example: '2024-06-15T14:55:00Z'
    Courier:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about the courier delivering the order'
      properties:
        courier_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the courier'
          example: 'CR98765'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the courier'
          example: 'John Doe'
        real_time_location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/RealTimeLocation'
    Restaurant:
      type: object
      description: 'Profile information of the restaurant fulfilling the order'
      properties:
        restaurant_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the restaurant'
          example: 'RST54321'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the restaurant'
          example: 'Green Garden'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Physical address of the restaurant'
          example: '123 Green St, Cityville'
        contact_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number of the restaurant'
          example: '+1234567890'
        cuisine:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of cuisine the restaurant specializes in'
          example: 'Vegan'
    OrderedDish:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a dish ordered'
      properties:
        dish_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the dish'
          example: 'DISH001'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dish'
          example: 'Quinoa Salad'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantity of this dish ordered'
          example: 2
        special_dietary_notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Special dietary notes or restrictions for the dish'
          example: 'Gluten-free, nut-free'
    OrderStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Current status of the food delivery order with courier and restaurant details'
      properties:
        order_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the order'
          example: 'ORD123456'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current status of the order'
          example: 'Out for Delivery'
        courier:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Courier'
        restaurant:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Restaurant'
        ordered_dishes:
          type: array
          description: 'List of dishes included in the order'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderedDish'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Blog Comment Submission
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CommentDetails:
      type: object
      description: 'The author and text content of the comment'
      properties:
        author_name:
          type: string
          description: 'The display name of the comment author'
          example: 'Charlie Brown'
        content:
          type: string
          description: 'The body text of the comment'
          example: 'Thanks for sharing this information.'
    CommentSubmission:
      type: object
      description: 'Payload for submitting a new comment'
      properties:
        post_id:
          type: string
          description: 'The unique identifier of the blog post'
          example: 'post_789'
        comment_data:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/CommentDetails'

        costs:

        total_service_cost:

system: Você é um Arquiteto de Software especialista em documentação de APIs. Converta o JSON de entrada em uma especificação OpenAPI 3.0 em formato YAML. Aloque os modelos em 'components/schemas'. Respeite a profundidade do dado: não crie referências ($ref) internas desnecessárias para objetos simples, utilizando a extração apenas para dados aninhados. Retorne APENAS o código YAML cru, sem formatação markdown e sem explicações adicionais.
assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    PatientDemographics:
      type: object
      description: 'Dados demográficos do paciente'
      properties:
        patient_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do paciente'
          example: '123456789'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do paciente'
          example: 'Maria Silva'
        age:
          type: integer
          description: 'Idade do paciente em anos'
          example: 34
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Gênero do paciente'
          example: 'female'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Intervalo normal para o biomarcador sanguíneo'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor mínimo considerado normal'
          example: 12.0
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor máximo considerado normal'
          example: 16.0
    BloodBiomarker:
      type: object
      description: 'Informação individual de um biomarcador sanguíneo'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do biomarcador'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor medido do biomarcador'
          example: 13.5
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unidade de medida do biomarcador'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    PathologistSignature:
      type: object
      description: 'Assinatura digital do patologista que revisou o exame'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do patologista'
          example: 'Dr. João Pereira'
        signed_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Data e hora da assinatura'
          example: '2024-04-21T14:00:00Z'
        digital_signature:
          type: string
          description: 'Assinatura digital codificada em formato hexadecimal'
          example: '3045022100dff9b8ea7fcb4a8610...'
    LaboratoryTestResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Resultado completo do exame laboratorial'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PatientDemographics'
        test_date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Data e hora da realização do exame'
          example: '2024-04-21T10:30:00Z'
        blood_biomarkers:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de biomarcadores sanguíneos analisados'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/BloodBiomarker'
        pathologist_signature:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PathologistSignature'
paths: {}

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Cloud Billing Dashboard
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CostItem:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes do custo por recurso'
      properties:
        resource:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do recurso utilizado nos serviços na nuvem'
          example: 'VM Instance'
        amount:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor gasto para o recurso especificado'
          example: 6789.10
    ServiceCost:
      type: object
      description: 'Custos agrupados por serviço em nuvem'
      properties:
        service_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do serviço em nuvem, por exemplo, computação ou armazenamento'
          example: 'Compute'
        costs:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista dos custos detalhados dos recursos dentro do serviço'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CostItem'
    Forecast:
      type: object
      description: 'Estimativa de custos futuros baseada em dados atuais'
      properties:
        next_month_estimate:
          type: number
          description: 'Estimativa do custo para o próximo mês'
          example: 13000.00
        confidence_level:
          type: number
          description: 'Nível de confiança da previsão, variando de 0 a 1'
          example: 0.85
    BillingDashboard:
      type: object

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: News Article API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Author:
      type: object
      description: 'Author byline details for the news article'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the author'
          example: 'Jane Smith'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact email of the author'
          example: 'jane.smith@example.com'
    MultimediaItem:
      type: object
      description: 'An embedded multimedia asset within the article'
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of multimedia asset'
          example: 'image'
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL to the multimedia asset'
          example: 'https://news.example.com/assets/solar_panels.jpg'
        caption:
          type: string
          description: 'Caption describing the multimedia asset'
          example: 'Solar panels installed on a rooftop'
    Article:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital news publication article'
      properties:
        headline:
          type: string
          description: 'Headline of the news article'
          example: 'Breakthrough in Renewable Energy Technology Announced'
        author:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Author'
        multimedia:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of embedded multimedia assets'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MultimediaItem'
        tags:
          type: array
          description: 'List of related article tags'
          items:
            type: string
            description: 'A related tag for the article'
            example: 'Renewable Energy'

  schemas:
    User:
      type: object

      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the user'
          example: 'user_1001'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Email address of the user'
          example: 'alice.johnson@example.com'
    OccupiedHotDesk:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a currently occupied hot-desk'
      properties:
        desk_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the hot-desk'
          example: 'desk_101'
        user:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
        occupied_since:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Timestamp when the desk became occupied'
          example: '2024-06-08T09:00:00Z'
    FloorPlan:
      type: object
      description: 'Floor plan of a co-working space floor with currently occupied hot-desks'
      properties:
        floor_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the floor'
          example: 'floor_1'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name or designation of the floor'
          example: 'First Floor'
        occupied_hot_desks:
          type: array
          description: 'List of hot-desks currently occupied on this floor'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OccupiedHotDesk'
    MeetingRoomReservation:
      type: object
      description: 'Upcoming reservation details for a meeting room'
      properties:
        reservation_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the room reservation'
          example: 'res_501'
        room_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the meeting room reserved'
          example: 'Alpha Room'
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Start time of the meeting room reservation'
          example: '2024-06-08T13:00:00Z'
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'End time of the meeting room reservation'
          example: '2024-06-08T14:00:00Z'
        reserved_by:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
    DeskAvailabilityReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Report of desk availability including floor plans, occupied hot-desks, and upcoming meeting room reservations'
      properties:
        floor_plans:
          type: array
          description: 'List of floor plans with occupied hot-desks per floor'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/FloorPlan'
        upcoming_meeting_room_reservations:
          type: array
          description: 'List of upcoming reservations for meeting rooms'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MeetingRoomReservation'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Propriedade Imobiliária
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ArchitecturalSpecs:
      type: object
      description: 'Especificações arquitetônicas detalhadas da propriedade'
      properties:
        area_sqm:
          type: integer
          description: 'Área total da propriedade em metros quadrados'
          example: 350
        number_of_bedrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de quartos'
          example: 4
        number_of_bathrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de banheiros'
          example: 3
        year_built:
          type: integer
          description: 'Ano em que a propriedade foi construída'
          example: 2022
        style:
          type: string
          description: 'Estilo arquitetônico da propriedade'
          example: 'Modern'
        features:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de características especiais da propriedade'
          items:
            type: string
            example: 'Open floor plan'
    ImageSet:
      type: object
      description: 'Conjunto de imagens em alta resolução agrupadas por categoria'
      properties:
        image_set_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do conjunto de imagens'
          example: 'Exterior Views'
        urls:
          type: array
          description: 'URLs das imagens em alta resolução'
          items:
            type: string
            format: uri
            example: 'https://realestate.example.com/images/prop123456/exterior1_hd.jpg'
    RealtorContact:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações de contato do corretor de imóveis responsável'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do corretor'
          example: 'Mariana Silva'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Número de telefone para contato'
          example: '+55 11 91234-5678'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Endereço de e-mail do corretor'
          example: 'mariana.silva@realestatebra.com'
        agency:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome da agência imobiliária'
          example: 'Imóveis Brasil'
    PropertyListing:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes completos de um anúncio de propriedade imobiliária'
      properties:
        property_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da propriedade'
          example: 'PROP123456'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Título do anúncio da propriedade'
          example: 'Luxurious Modern Villa'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Descrição detalhada da propriedade'
          example: 'A stunning modern villa with breathtaking views and exquisite architectural details.'
        architectural_specs:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ArchitecturalSpecs'
        images:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de conjuntos de imagens em alta resolução'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ImageSet'
        realtor_contact:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/RealtorContact'

  schemas:
    Director:

          description: 'Ano de nascimento do diretor'

          example: 'Leonardo DiCaprio'
        character:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do personagem interpretado'
          example: 'Dom Cobb'
    Link:
      type: object
      description: 'Link HATEOAS para navegação'
      properties:
        href:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: 'URL do recurso relacionado'

          type: string

        headline:

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Dental Clinic Patient History
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ToothChart:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes anatômicos do dente no gráfico odontológico'
      properties:
        tooth_number:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número do dente conforme notação odontológica'
          example: 12
        surface:
          type: string
          description: 'Superfície do dente avaliada'
          example: 'occlusal'
        condition:
          type: string
          description: 'Condição clínica observada na superfície do dente'
          example: 'cavity'
    PastProcedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Procedimento odontológico realizado anteriormente'
      properties:
        procedure_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do procedimento'
          example: 'proc_001'
        procedure_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do procedimento realizado'
          example: 'filling'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data em que o procedimento foi realizado'
          example: '2023-05-15'
        tooth_number:
          type: integer
          nullable: true
          description: 'Número do dente tratado, se aplicável'
          example: 12
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Notas adicionais sobre o procedimento'
          example: 'Composite resin filling placed'
    ScheduledCleaningMetadata:
      type: object
      description: 'Metadados detalhados para limpezas agendadas'
      properties:
        reminder_method:
          type: string
          description: 'Método usado para enviar o lembrete'
          example: 'email'
        reminder_sent_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data em que o lembrete foi enviado'
          example: '2024-07-10'
    ScheduledCleanings:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre limpezas futuras agendadas'
      properties:
        next_appointment_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data da próxima consulta de limpeza'
          example: '2024-07-20'
        reminder_sent:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o lembrete foi enviado'
          example: true
        cleaning_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Tipo de limpeza programada'
          example: 'prophylaxis'
        metadata:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ScheduledCleaningMetadata'
    PatientHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Histórico completo do paciente odontológico'
      properties:
        tooth_chart:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothChart'
        past_procedures:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de procedimentos odontológicos realizados previamente'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PastProcedure'
        scheduled_cleanings:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ScheduledCleanings'
  PatientHistoryResponse:
    type: object
    description: 'Resposta contendo o histórico do paciente detalhado'
    properties:
      patient_history:
        $ref: '#/components/schemas/PatientHistory'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Rastreio da Frota de Logística
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Location:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações GPS atuais da caminhonete de entrega'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Latitude da localização atual'
          example: -23.55052
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Longitude da localização atual'
          example: -46.633308
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Data e hora da leitura GPS'
          example: '2024-06-01T14:25:43Z'
    Driver:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações do motorista da caminhonete'
      properties:
        driver_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do motorista'
          example: 'DRV987'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do motorista'
          example: 'João Silva'
        license_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número da carteira de habilitação do motorista'
          example: 'ABC1234567'
    RouteStop:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes dos pontos de parada no trajeto da entrega'
      properties:
        stop_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do ponto de parada'
          example: 'STP001'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Endereço completo do ponto de parada'
          example: 'Rua das Flores, 123, São Paulo, SP'
        scheduled_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Horário programado para a parada'
          example: '2024-06-01T15:00:00Z'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Estado atual da parada na rota (ex: pending, completed)'
          example: 'pending'
    FleetTrackingResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta detalhada de rastreamento da caminhonete de entrega'
      properties:
        truck_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da caminhonete'
          example: 'TRK12345'
        current_location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
        speed_kmh:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Velocidade atual da caminhonete em km/h'
          example: 65.5
        driver:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Driver'
        route_stops:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de todos os pontos de parada na rota da entrega'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/RouteStop'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    PatientDemographics:
      type: object
      description: 'Demographic details of the patient'
      properties:
        patient_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the patient'
          example: 'P123456789'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the patient'
          example: 'John Doe'
        age:
          type: integer
          description: 'Age of the patient in years'
          example: 45
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Gender of the patient'
          example: 'Male'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Reference range defining normal biomarker values'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Minimum normal value'
          example: 13.5
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Maximum normal value'
          example: 17.5
    BloodBiomarker:
      type: object
      description: 'Blood biomarker measurement with associated normal range'
      properties:
        biomarker_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the blood biomarker'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Measured value of the biomarker'
          example: 14.2
        units:
          type: string
          description: 'Measurement units for the biomarker value'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    PathologistSignature:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital signature details of the reviewing pathologist'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the pathologist'
          example: 'Dr. Alice Smith'
        signed_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Timestamp when the report was signed'
          example: '2024-05-10T14:30:00Z'
        digital_certificate_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier for the digital certificate used'
          example: 'CERT20240510XYZ'
    LabTestResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete laboratory test result including patient info, biomarkers, and signature'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PatientDemographics'
        blood_biomarkers:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of blood biomarker test results'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/BloodBiomarker'
        pathologist_signature:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PathologistSignature'

        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the dentist'
          example: 'dent_101'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the dentist'
          example: 'Dr. Alice Johnson'
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a past dental procedure'
      properties:
        procedure_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the procedure'
          example: 'proc_001'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the procedure performed'
          example: 'Root Canal Treatment'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the procedure was performed'
          example: '2023-11-10'
        dentist:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Dentist'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional notes regarding the procedure'
          example: 'Successful treatment with temporary crown.'
    ToothChart:
      type: object
      description: 'Anatomical tooth chart information'
      properties:
        tooth_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier for the tooth'
          example: 'T12'
        position:
          type: string
          description: 'Position of the tooth in the mouth'
          example: 'Upper Right'
        condition:
          type: string
          description: 'Current condition of the tooth'
          example: 'Good'
        last_checked:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the tooth was last examined'
          example: '2024-05-15'
    UpcomingCleaningsMeta:
      type: object
      description: 'Metadata for upcoming scheduled dental cleanings'
      properties:
        next_scheduled_cleaning:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date of the next scheduled cleaning'
          example: '2024-07-10'
        reminder_sent:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if a reminder has been sent to the patient'
          example: true
        location:
          type: string
          description: 'Location within the clinic for the cleaning appointment'
          example: 'Clinic Room 3'
    PatientHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete patient history including tooth chart, past procedures, and upcoming cleaning metadata'
      properties:
        tooth_chart:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothChart'
        past_procedures:
          type: array
          description: 'List of past dental procedures the patient has undergone'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Procedure'
        upcoming_cleanings_meta:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleaningsMeta'
  schemas:
    PatientHistoryResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response container for patient dental history data'
      properties:
        patient_history:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PatientHistory'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Co-working Space Desk Availability Report
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    User:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a user or occupant'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the user'
          example: 'U1001'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Email address of the user'
          example: 'alice.johnson@example.com'
    HotDesk:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a hot-desk including occupancy status'
      properties:
        desk_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the hot-desk'
          example: 'HD101'
        occupied:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the hot-desk is currently occupied'
          example: true
        occupant:
          anyOf:
            - $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
            - type: 'null'
          description: 'Occupant details if desk is occupied, otherwise null'
          example:
            user_id: 'U1001'
            name: 'Alice Johnson'
            email: 'alice.johnson@example.com'
    MeetingRoom:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about a meeting room available on a floor'
      properties:
        room_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the meeting room'
          example: 'MR1'
        room_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the meeting room'
          example: 'Ocean View'
        capacity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Maximum occupancy of the meeting room'
          example: 8
    FloorPlan:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a floor plan including hot-desks and meeting rooms'
      properties:
        floor_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the floor'
          example: '1A'
        floor_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the floor'
          example: 'Ground Floor'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Description of the floor layout and usage'
          example: 'Floor illustrating the layout of hot-desks and meeting rooms.'
        hot_desks:
          type: array
          description: 'List of hot-desks on the floor with occupancy status'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/HotDesk'
        meeting_rooms:
          type: array
          description: 'Meeting rooms located on this floor'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MeetingRoom'
    OccupiedHotDesk:
      type: object
      description: 'Currently occupied hot-desk details with occupant info'
      properties:
        desk_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier for the occupied hot-desk'
          example: 'HD101'
        floor_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier of the floor where the hot-desk is located'
          example: '1A'
        occupant:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
    MeetingRoomReservation:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of an upcoming meeting room reservation'
      properties:
        reservation_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the reservation'
          example: 'R5001'
        room_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Meeting room identifier for the reservation'
          example: 'MR1'
        room_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the meeting room reserved'
          example: 'Ocean View'
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Reservation start timestamp in ISO 8601 format'
          example: '2024-06-05T10:00:00Z'
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Reservation end timestamp in ISO 8601 format'
          example: '2024-06-05T11:00:00Z'
        reserved_by:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
        purpose:
          type: string
          description: 'Purpose or title of the meeting'
          example: 'Team Sync'
    DeskAvailabilityReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Co-working space desk availability including floor plans, occupied desks, and meeting reservations'
      properties:
        floor_plans:
          type: array
          description: 'Collection of floor plans with hot-desks and meeting rooms'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/FloorPlan'
        occupied_hot_desks:
          type: array
          description: 'List of currently occupied hot-desks with occupant details'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OccupiedHotDesk'
        upcoming_meeting_room_reservations:
          type: array
          description: 'Scheduled meeting room reservations in the near future'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MeetingRoomReservation'
  schemas:
    DeskAvailabilityReport: {}

    User: {}
    HotDesk: {}

    OccupiedHotDesk: {}

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: University Student Dashboard
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CompletedCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'Curso finalizado pelo estudante'
      properties:
        course_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Código único do curso'
          example: 'MAT101'
        course_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do curso'
          example: 'Calculus I'
        grade:
          type: string
          description: 'Nota final obtida no curso'
          example: 'A'
        completed_term:
          type: string
          description: 'Semestre ou período em que o curso foi concluído'
          example: '2023-1'
    AcademicHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Histórico acadêmico do estudante'
      properties:
        gpa:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Coeficiente de rendimento acadêmico'
          example: 3.8
        completed_courses:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de cursos finalizados'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CompletedCourse'
    CurrentCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'Curso em que o estudante está atualmente matriculado'
      properties:
        course_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Código único do curso'
          example: 'CS201'
        course_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do curso'
          example: 'Data Structures'
        instructor:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do professor do curso'
          example: 'Prof. Ana Oliveira'
        credits:
          type: integer
          description: 'Número de créditos do curso'
          example: 4
    FinancialStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Estado financeiro do estudante'
      properties:
        tuition_due:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Valor devido da mensalidade'
          example: 1250.50
        last_payment_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data do último pagamento efetuado'
          example: '2024-05-10'
        payment_status:
          type: string
          description: 'Status atual do pagamento'
          example: 'Pending'
    StudentDashboard:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta da API com o dashboard do estudante'
      properties:
        student_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do estudante'
          example: '202312345'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do estudante'
          example: 'Lucas Silva'
        academic_history:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AcademicHistory'
        current_enrolled_courses:
          type: array
          description: 'Cursos em que o estudante está matriculado atualmente'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CurrentCourse'
        financial_status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialStatus'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Dental Clinic Patient History API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Tooth:
      type: object
      description: 'Anatomical tooth chart entry'
      properties:
        toothNumber:
          type: string
          description: 'Number identifier of the tooth'
          example: '11'
        toothName:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the tooth'
          example: 'Upper Right Central Incisor'
        condition:
          type: string
          description: 'Current condition or diagnosis of the tooth'
          example: 'Healthy'
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Past dental procedure performed on the patient'
      properties:
        procedureId:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the procedure'
          example: 'proc_101'
        procedureName:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dental procedure'
          example: 'Teeth Cleaning'
        datePerformed:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the procedure was performed'
          example: '2023-10-05'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional notes about the procedure'
          example: 'Routine cleaning, no issues found.'
    UpcomingCleaningsMeta:
      type: object
      description: 'Metadata for upcoming scheduled dental cleanings'
      properties:
        nextCleaningDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date of the next scheduled cleaning'
          example: '2024-07-20'
        location:
          type: string
          description: 'Location or room for the cleaning appointment'
          example: 'Clinic Room 3'
        reminderSet:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if a reminder has been set for the cleaning'
          example: true
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional notes or special instructions for the upcoming cleaning'
          example: 'Patient requested afternoon appointment.'
    PatientHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete dental patient history including tooth chart, past procedures, and upcoming cleanings'
      properties:
        toothChart:
          type: array
          description: 'List of anatomical teeth with current conditions'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Tooth'
        pastProcedures:
          type: array
          description: 'List of past dental procedures performed on the patient'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Procedure'
        upcomingCleanings:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleaningsMeta'
  PatientHistoryResponse:
    type: object
    description: 'Response object containing the patient dental history details'
    properties:
      patientHistory:
        $ref: '#/components/schemas/PatientHistory'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Mortgage Loan Application Response
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Appraiser:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of the property appraiser'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the appraiser'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        license_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Official license number of the appraiser'
          example: 'APPR-456789'
    PropertyValuation:
      type: object
      description: 'Valuation details of the property'
      properties:
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Full address of the property being valued'
          example: '123 Elm Street, Springfield, IL'
        estimated_value:
          type: integer
          description: 'Estimated market value of the property in USD'
          example: 250000
        valuation_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the property was valued'
          example: '2024-06-15'
        appraiser:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Appraiser'
    ComplianceDocument:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a required compliance document'
      properties:
        document_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type or name of the compliance document required'
          example: 'Proof of Income'
        required_by:
          type: string
          description: 'Entity requiring the document'
          example: 'Lender'
        submission_deadline:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Deadline date for document submission'
          example: '2024-07-01'
    MortgageLoanApplicationResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response containing mortgage loan application details'
      properties:
        applicant_credit_score:
          type: integer
          description: 'Credit score of the loan applicant'
          example: 720
        property_valuation:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PropertyValuation'
        required_compliance_documents:
          type: array
          description: 'List of documents required to comply with loan application regulations'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ComplianceDocument'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    PatientDemographics:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações demográficas do paciente'
      properties:
        patient_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do paciente'
          example: '123456789'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do paciente'
          example: 'Ana Silva'
        age:
          type: integer
          description: 'Idade do paciente em anos'
          example: 37
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Sexo do paciente'
          example: 'Female'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Intervalo de referência para biomarcadores sanguíneos'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor mínimo considerado normal'
          example: 12.0
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor máximo considerado normal'
          example: 16.0
    BloodBiomarker:
      type: object
      description: 'Dados de cada biomarcador sanguíneo analisado'
      properties:
        biomarker:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do biomarcador'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Valor medido do biomarcador'
          example: 13.5
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unidade de medida do biomarcador'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    PathologistSignature:
      type: object
      description: 'Assinatura digital do patologista responsável pela revisão'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do patologista'
          example: 'Dr. Carlos Souza'
        signed_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Timestamp da assinatura digital'
          example: '2024-04-10T14:35:00Z'
        signature:
          type: string
          description: 'String codificada da assinatura digital em base64'
          example: 'base64EncodedDigitalSignatureString=='
    LaboratoryTestResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Resultado completo do exame laboratorial do paciente'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PatientDemographics'
        blood_biomarkers:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de biomarcadores sanguíneos com seus valores e intervalos de normalidade'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/BloodBiomarker'
        pathologist_signature:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PathologistSignature'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Restaurant Reservation API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    DietaryRestrictions:
      type: object
      description: 'Dietary restrictions for the customer'
      properties:
        vegetarian:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the customer is vegetarian'
          example: true
        gluten_free:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the customer requires gluten-free food'
          example: false
        nut_allergy:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the customer has nut allergies'
          example: true
    Customer:
      type: object
      description: 'Information about the customer making the reservation'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the customer'
          example: 'John Doe'
        dietary_restrictions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DietaryRestrictions'
    PreorderedItem:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about a single pre-ordered menu item'
      properties:
        item_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the menu item'
          example: 'dish_101'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the pre-ordered dish'
          example: 'Quinoa Salad'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of portions ordered'
          example: 2
        special_requests:
          type: string
          description: 'Any special preparation requests for the item'
          example: 'No dressing'
    ReservationResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'API response schema for restaurant reservations'
      properties:
        table_number:
          type: integer
          description: 'Assigned table number for the reservation'
          example: 12
        customer:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Customer'
        preordered_items:
          type: array
          description: 'List of pre-ordered menu items'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreorderedItem'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Logistics Fleet Tracking
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Location:
      type: object
      description: 'Coordenadas GPS atuais do caminhão'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          description: 'Latitude atual do veículo'
          example: -23.55052
        longitude:
          type: number
          description: 'Longitude atual do veículo'
          example: -46.633308
    DriverInfo:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações do motorista do caminhão'
      properties:
        driver_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do motorista'
          example: 'drv_789'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do motorista'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
        license_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Número da carteira de motorista'
          example: 'ABC123456'
    Stop:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações de uma parada no trajeto'
      properties:
        stop_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da parada'
          example: 'stop_001'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Endereço da parada'
          example: 'Rua das Flores, 123, São Paulo'
        scheduled_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Horário programado para a parada'
          example: '2024-06-07T10:30:00Z'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Status atual da parada (ex: completed, pending)'
          example: 'completed'
    FleetTrackingResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Dados da localização e rota do caminhão de entrega'
      properties:
        truck_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do caminhão'
          example: 'truck_1024'
        location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
        speed_kmph:
          type: integer
          description: 'Velocidade atual do caminhão em km/h'
          example: 65
        driver:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DriverInfo'
        stops:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de paradas no trajeto do caminhão'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Stop'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Food Delivery Order Status
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Location:
      type: object
      description: 'Real-time location data with coordinates and timestamp'
      properties:
        latitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Latitude coordinate of the courier location'
          example: 40.712776
        longitude:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Longitude coordinate of the courier location'
          example: -74.005974
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Timestamp when the location was recorded in UTC'
          example: '2024-06-01T14:30:00Z'
    Courier:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about the courier handling the order'
      properties:
        courier_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the courier'
          example: 'CR7890'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the courier'
          example: 'John Doe'
        real_time_location:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Location'
    Restaurant:
      type: object
      description: 'Profile details of the restaurant fulfilling the order'
      properties:
        restaurant_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the restaurant'
          example: 'RST4567'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the restaurant'
          example: 'Green Garden'
        address:
          type: string
          description: 'Physical address of the restaurant'
          example: '123 Healthy Ave, New York, NY'
        rating:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Average customer rating of the restaurant'
          example: 4.5
        phone_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Contact phone number of the restaurant'
          example: '+1-555-123-4567'
    Dish:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a single ordered dish including special dietary notes'
      properties:
        dish_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the dish'
          example: 'DISH001'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dish ordered'
          example: 'Quinoa Salad'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantity of this dish ordered'
          example: 1
        special_dietary_notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Special dietary information or notes regarding the dish'
          example: 'Gluten-free, Vegan'
    OrderStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Current status of a food delivery order including courier location, restaurant profile, and ordered dishes'
      properties:
        order_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the order'
          example: 'ORD123456'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current status of the order'
          example: 'Out for delivery'
        courier:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Courier'
        restaurant:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Restaurant'
        ordered_dishes:
          type: array
          description: 'List of dishes ordered'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Dish'

  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:

      type: object
      description: 'Demographic information for the patient'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the patient'
          example: 'P123456'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the patient'
          example: 'John Doe'
        age:
          type: integer
          description: 'Age of the patient in years'
          example: 45
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Biological gender of the patient'
          example: 'Male'

      type: object
      description: 'Normal range for a biomarker value'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Minimum normal value for the biomarker'
          example: 13.0
        max:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Maximum normal value for the biomarker'
          example: 17.0
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Measurement unit for the biomarker'
          example: 'g/dL'
    BiomarkerResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Result data for a single blood biomarker'
      properties:
        biomarker:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the blood biomarker'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Measured biomarker value'
          example: 13.5
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unit of measurement for the value'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    PathologistSignature:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital signature details of the reviewing pathologist'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the pathologist'
          example: 'Dr. Alice Smith'
        signature_image_url:

    LaboratoryTestResult:

      description: 'Complete laboratory test result with patient and test details'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Patient'
        test_results:
          type: array
          description: 'List of blood biomarker test results'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/BiomarkerResult'
        pathologist_signature:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PathologistSignature'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: University Student Dashboard API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CompletedCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de um curso concluído pelo estudante'
      properties:
        course_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do curso'
          example: 'csc101'
        course_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do curso'
          example: 'Introduction to Computer Science'
        grade:
          type: string
          description: 'Nota obtida no curso'
          example: 'A'
        semester:
          type: string
          description: 'Semestre em que o curso foi finalizado'
          example: '2022.1'
    AcademicHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Histórico acadêmico do estudante'
      properties:
        completed_courses:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista dos cursos concluídos'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CompletedCourse'
        gpa:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Coeficiente de rendimento acadêmico'
          example: 3.75
    CurrentCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes de um curso atualmente matriculado'
      properties:
        course_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador do curso atual'
          example: 'phy301'
        course_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do curso'
          example: 'Physics III'
        credits:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade de créditos do curso'
          example: 4
        instructor:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do professor responsável pelo curso'
          example: 'Dr. João Martins'
        schedule:
          type: string
          description: 'Horário das aulas'
          example: 'Tue/Thu 10:00-11:30'
    FinancialStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Status financeiro relacionado à mensalidade'
      properties:
        tuition_due:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Valor da mensalidade a ser paga'
          example: 1200.50
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data limite para pagamento'
          example: '2024-07-10'
        payment_status:
          type: string
          description: 'Status atual do pagamento'
          example: 'pending'
    StudentDashboard:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta completa do dashboard do estudante'
      properties:
        student_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do estudante'
          example: 'stu_12345'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do estudante'
          example: 'Ana Clara Silva'
        academic_history:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AcademicHistory'
        current_courses:
          type: array
          description: 'Cursos em que o estudante está atualmente matriculado'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CurrentCourse'
        financial_status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialStatus'

  title: Cloud Infrastructure Billing Dashboard

components:
  schemas:
    CostDetail:
      type: object
      description: 'Detailed cost information for a specific resource type within a service'
      properties:
        resource_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of the resource being billed'
          example: 'virtual_machine'
        units_used:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of units consumed for the resource'
          example: 320
        unit_cost:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Cost per single unit of the resource'
          example: 20.5
        total_cost:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Total cost for this resource type (units_used * unit_cost)'
          example: 6560
    ServiceCost:
      type: object
      description: 'Cost breakdown by a cloud service including details per resource type'
      properties:
        service_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the cloud service'
          example: 'compute'
        monthly_cost:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Total monthly cost for this service'
          example: 8400.50
        details:
          type: array
          description: 'List of detailed costs for resource types within the service'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CostDetail'
    ConfidenceInterval:
      type: object
      description: 'Projected forecast confidence interval representing cost estimate bounds'
      properties:
        low:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Lower bound of the forecasted cost estimate'
          example: 12500.00
        high:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Upper bound of the forecasted cost estimate'
          example: 14000.00
    Forecast:

      description: 'Projected future cloud infrastructure costs'
      properties:
        next_month_estimate:

          format: float
          description: 'Estimated total spend for the next month'

        confidence_interval:

    BillingDashboard:
      type: object
      description: 'Monthly billing overview including total spend, cost breakdown by service, and forecasts'

        total_monthly_spend:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Total cloud spend for the current month'

          type: array
          description: 'Breakdown of costs categorized by cloud service'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ServiceCost'
        forecast:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Forecast'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Patient:
      type: object
      description: 'Patient demographic information'
      properties:
        patient_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the patient'
          example: '123456789'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the patient'
          example: 'John Doe'
        date_of_birth:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date of birth of the patient'
          example: '1980-05-15'
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Gender of the patient'
          example: 'Male'
    NormalRange:
      type: object
      description: 'Reference normal range values for a biomarker'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Minimum normal value'
          example: 13.0
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Maximum normal value'
          example: 17.0
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Measurement unit for the normal range values'
          example: 'g/dL'
    Biomarker:
      type: object
      description: 'A blood biomarker measurement with its normal range'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the biomarker'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Measured value of the biomarker'
          example: 14.2
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unit of the measured value'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/NormalRange'
    LabTest:
      type: object
      description: 'Laboratory test details including biomarkers'
      properties:
        test_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the laboratory test'
          example: 'LAB20240601'
        test_date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Date and time when the test was performed'
          example: '2024-06-01T09:30:00Z'
        biomarkers:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of measured blood biomarkers with normal ranges'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Biomarker'
    PathologistSignature:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital signature of the reviewing pathologist'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the pathologist'
          example: 'Dr. Emily Carter'
        signature_image:
          type: string
          description: 'Base64 encoded image of the digital signature with data URI scheme prefix'
          example: 'data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAOEAAADhCAYAAADQ7nrTA...'
        signed_date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Timestamp when the signature was made'
          example: '2024-06-01T12:00:00Z'
    LabTestResult:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete laboratory test result document'
      properties:
        patient:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Patient'
        lab_test:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/LabTest'
        pathologist_signature:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PathologistSignature'

info:
  title: Dental Clinic Patient History

components:
  schemas:
    Tooth:
      type: object
      description: 'Representation of a single tooth and its condition'
      properties:
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Universal tooth number based on dental notation'
          example: '18'
        condition:
          type: string
          description: 'Current condition or diagnosis of the tooth'
          example: 'Cavity'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional remarks about the tooth condition'
          example: 'Needs filling'
    ToothChart:
      type: object
      description: 'Anatomical chart of teeth with conditions'
      properties:
        teeth:
          type: array
          description: 'List of individual teeth and their status'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Tooth'
    PastProcedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about a previously performed dental procedure'
      properties:
        procedure_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the procedure'
          example: 'proc_1001'
        procedure_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dental procedure performed'
          example: 'Cavity Filling'
        date_performed:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the procedure was completed'
          example: '2023-02-14'
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          description: 'Tooth involved in the procedure, if applicable'
          example: '18'
        dentist:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dentist who performed the procedure'
          example: 'Dr. Lisa P.'
    UpcomingCleaningMetadata:
      type: object
      description: 'Metadata related to upcoming scheduled tooth cleaning'
      properties:
        reminder_sent:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if a reminder has been sent to the patient'
          example: true
        reminder_method:
          type: string
          description: 'Method used to send the reminder notification'

      description: 'Complete dental patient history including tooth chart, past procedures, and upcoming cleanings'

        patient_id:

          description: 'Unique identifier for the patient'
          example: 'pat_3245'

          description: 'List of past dental procedures undergone by the patient'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Restaurant Reservation Response
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    DietaryRestrictions:
      type: object
      description: 'Object representing customer dietary restrictions'
      properties:
        vegetarian:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the customer is vegetarian'
          example: true
        gluten_free:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the customer requires gluten free food'
          example: false
        nut_allergy:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates if the customer has a nut allergy'
          example: true
        other:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional dietary restrictions or notes'
          example: 'No shellfish'
    Customer:
      type: object
      description: 'Customer details including dietary restrictions'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the customer'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
        dietary_restrictions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DietaryRestrictions'
    PreOrderedItem:
      type: object
      description: 'Individual item pre-ordered by the customer'
      properties:
        item_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier for the menu item'
          example: 'dish_001'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the pre-ordered menu item'
          example: 'Grilled Vegetable Salad'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of servings ordered'
          example: 2
        special_requests:
          type: string
          description: 'Any special instructions or requests for this item'
          example: 'Extra dressing on the side'
    ReservationResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response object for a restaurant reservation'
      properties:
        table_number:
          type: integer
          description: 'Table number assigned for the reservation'
          example: 12
        customer:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Customer'
        pre_ordered_items:
          type: array
          description: 'List of items pre-ordered by the customer'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreOrderedItem'

Retorne APENAS o código YAML cru, sem formatação markdown e sem explicações adicionais.
assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Smart City Traffic Camera Report API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    VehicleType:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações detalhadas sobre um tipo de veículo detectado'
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          description: 'Tipo do veículo detectado'
          example: 'Car'
        count:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade desse tipo de veículo presente na interseção'
          example: 45
        average_speed_kmh:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Velocidade média dos veículos em km/h'
          example: 15.4
    PedestrianCrossingAlert:
      type: object
      description: 'Alerta ativo ou inativo para uma passagem de pedestres'
      properties:
        crossing_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da passagem de pedestres'
          example: 'cross_001'
        active_alert:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indica se o alerta está ativo para a passagem'
          example: true
        time_remaining_seconds:
          type: integer
          description: 'Tempo restante em segundos para o alerta'
          example: 25
    TrafficCameraReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Relatório da câmera de tráfego em uma interseção específica'
      properties:
        intersection:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome ou descrição da interseção monitorada'
          example: 'Av. Paulista & R. Augusta'
        congestion_level:
          type: string
          description: 'Nível de congestionamento atual na interseção'
          example: 'High'
        detected_vehicles:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de tipos de veículos detectados na interseção'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/VehicleType'
        pedestrian_crossings:
          type: array
          description: 'Alertas ativos para passagens de pedestres na interseção'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PedestrianCrossingAlert'
