assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: E-sports Match Summary API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    TeamScores:
      type: object
      description: 'Scores of competing teams'
      properties:
        team_a:
          type: integer
          description: 'Score of Team A'
          example: 16
        team_b:
          type: integer
          description: 'Score of Team B'
          example: 12
    PlayerStats:
      type: object
      description: 'Individual player statistics'
      properties:
        player_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the player'
          example: 'player_101'
        kills:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of kills by the player'
          example: 20
        deaths:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of deaths of the player'
          example: 5
        assists:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of assists by the player'
          example: 7
    MatchEvent:
      type: object
      description: 'Key event in the match timeline'
      properties:
        time:
          type: string
          description: 'Timestamp of the event in MM:ss format'
          example: '00:05'
        event_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of match event'
          example: 'First Blood'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Detailed description of the event'
          example: 'Player player_101 secured the first kill of the match.'
    MatchSummary:
      type: object
      description: 'Summary of the e-sports match including scores, player stats, and timeline'
      properties:
        team_scores:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/TeamScores'
        player_stats:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of player statistics'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PlayerStats'
        timeline:
          type: array
          description: 'Chronological list of key match events'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MatchEvent'
    MatchSummaryResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response containing the entire match summary'
      properties:
        match_summary:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/MatchSummary'

          description: 'List of allergen names the customer must avoid'
          items:
            type: string
            description: 'Name of allergen'
            example: 'nuts'
    Customer:
      type: object
      description: 'Customer details including dietary restrictions'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the customer'
          example: 'Alice Johnson'
        dietary_restrictions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DietaryRestrictions'
    PreOrderedItem:
      type: object
      description: 'An item pre-ordered by the customer'
      properties:
        item_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier of the pre-ordered menu item'
          example: 'dish_101'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the pre-ordered dish'
          example: 'Grilled Vegetable Salad'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of portions ordered'
          example: 2
    ReservationResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'API response for a restaurant reservation with customer and order details'
      properties:
        table_number:
          type: integer
          description: 'Assigned table number for the reservation'
          example: 12
        customer:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Customer'
        pre_ordered_items:
          type: array
          description: 'List of items pre-ordered by the customer'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreOrderedItem'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Resposta do Dashboard do Estudante
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CourseGrade:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre uma disciplina concluída com nota'
      properties:
        course_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Código da disciplina'
          example: 'MAT101'
        course_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome da disciplina'
          example: 'Cálculo I'
        grade:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Nota obtida na disciplina'
          example: 8.0
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Situação da disciplina'
          example: 'Concluído'
    CompletedTerm:
      type: object
      description: 'Termo acadêmico com disciplinas e desempenho'
      properties:
        term:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificação do termo acadêmico'
          example: '2023.1'
        gpa:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Coeficiente de rendimento acadêmico do termo'
          example: 8.5
        courses:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de disciplinas concluídas no termo'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CourseGrade'
    AcademicHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Histórico acadêmico com termos concluídos'
      properties:
        completed_terms:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de termos acadêmicos concluídos'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CompletedTerm'
    CurrentCourse:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre uma disciplina na qual o estudante está atualmente matriculado'
      properties:
        course_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Código da disciplina'
          example: 'PROG201'
        course_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome da disciplina'
          example: 'Programação Avançada'
        credits:
          type: integer
          description: 'Quantidade de créditos da disciplina'
          example: 5
        instructor:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do professor responsável pela disciplina'
          example: 'Prof. Carlos Silva'
        schedule:
          type: string
          description: 'Horário das aulas da disciplina'
          example: 'Terças e quintas, 14:00-16:00'
    FinancialStatus:
      type: object
      description: 'Status financeiro referente à mensalidade do estudante'
      properties:
        tuition_due:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Valor da mensalidade a pagar'
          example: 3500.00
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Data limite para pagamento'
          example: '2024-07-15'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Estado atual do pagamento'
          example: 'Em aberto'
    StudentDashboard:
      type: object
      description: 'Resposta completa do dashboard do estudante'
      properties:
        student_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do estudante'
          example: '2023123456'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do estudante'
          example: 'Ana Beatriz Souza'
        academic_history:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AcademicHistory'
        current_enrolled_courses:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de disciplinas atualmente matriculadas'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CurrentCourse'
        financial_status:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialStatus'
paths: {}

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Cloud Infrastructure Billing Dashboard
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    CostDetail:
      type: object
      description: 'Detailed component cost within a cloud service'
      properties:
        component:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the component within the service'
          example: 'vm_instances'
        cost:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Cost incurred by the component in USD'
          example: 5000.3
    ServiceCost:
      type: object
      description: 'Cost breakdown by a specific cloud service'
      properties:
        service_name:
          type: string
          description: 'The name of the cloud service'
          example: 'compute'
        monthly_cost:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Total monthly cost for the service in USD'
          example: 8000.5
        details:
          type: array
          description: 'List of cost details by service components'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CostDetail'
    Forecast:
      type: object
      description: 'Projected billing spend forecast for upcoming months'
      properties:
        month:
          type: string
          description: 'Month of the forecast in YYYY-MM format'
          example: '2024-07'
        projected_spend:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Projected spend amount in USD for the month'
          example: 13000.0
    BillingDashboard:
      type: object
      description: 'Overview of the cloud infrastructure billing dashboard'
      properties:
        total_monthly_spend:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Total cloud spend for the current month in USD'
          example: 12400.75
        cost_breakdown:
          type: array
          description: 'Breakdown of costs by cloud service'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ServiceCost'
        projected_forecasts:
          type: array
          description: 'Projected monthly spend forecasts for future months'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Forecast'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Kitchen Display System Ticket
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    AllergyWarning:
      type: string
      description: 'Allergy warning associated with the menu item'
      example: 'Dairy'
    OrderItem:
      type: object
      description: 'An individual order item with instructions and allergy warnings'
      properties:
        item_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the ordered menu item'
          example: 'Cheeseburger'
        quantity:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of this item ordered'
          example: 2
        special_instructions:
          type: string
          description: 'Special preparation instructions for this item'
          example: 'No pickles'
        allergy_warnings:
          type: array
          description: 'List of allergy warnings for this item'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/AllergyWarning'
    StationGroup:
      type: object
      description: 'Group of ordered items organized by a preparation station'
      properties:
        station_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the preparation station'
          example: 'Grill'
        orders:
          type: array
          description: 'List of ordered items for this station'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderItem'
    KitchenTicket:
      type: object
      description: 'Kitchen display system ticket containing table number, stations, and orders'
      properties:
        table_number:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number identifying the table placing the order'
          example: 12
        stations:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of preparation stations with their respective orders'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/StationGroup'

info:
  title: Real Estate Property Listing
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Address:
      type: object
      description: 'Physical address of the property'
      properties:
        street:
          type: string
          description: 'Street address of the property'
          example: '1234 Elm Street'
        city:
          type: string
          description: 'City where the property is located'
          example: 'Springfield'
        state:
          type: string
          description: 'State where the property is located'
          example: 'IL'
        zip_code:
          type: string
          description: 'Postal code of the property location'
          example: '62704'
    ArchitecturalSpecs:
      type: object
      description: 'Architectural specifications of the property'
      properties:
        year_built:
          type: integer
          description: 'Year the property was built'
          example: 1995
        square_feet:
          type: integer
          description: 'Total square footage of the property'
          example: 3500
        bedrooms:
          type: integer
          description: 'Number of bedrooms in the property'
          example: 4
        bathrooms:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Number of bathrooms in the property'
          example: 3.5
        flooring:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of flooring used in the property'
          example: 'hardwood'
        heating_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of heating system installed'
          example: 'central'
        cooling_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of cooling system installed'
          example: 'central_air'
    ImageGroup:
      type: object
      description: 'A group of images for the property with a description and URLs'
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Description of the image group'
          example: 'Front view'
        urls:
          type: array
          description: 'List of high-resolution image URLs'
          items:
            type: string
            format: uri
            description: 'URL to a high-resolution image'
            example: 'https://realestate.example.com/images/prop123_front_1.jpg'
    Realtor:
      type: object
      description: 'Contact information of the assigned realtor'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the realtor'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Phone number of the realtor'
          example: '+1-555-123-4567'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: 'Email address of the realtor'
          example: 'jane.doe@realestateco.com'
        agency:
          type: string
          description: 'Real estate agency the realtor is affiliated with'
          example: 'Real Estate Co.'
    PropertyListing:
      type: object
      description: 'A full real estate property listing with specs, images, and realtor contact'
      properties:
        property_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the property'
          example: 'PROP123456'
        address:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Address'
        architectural_specs:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ArchitecturalSpecs'
        images:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of image groups detailing property images'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ImageGroup'
        realtor:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Realtor'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Co-Working Desk Availability Report
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    User:
      type: object
      description: 'Detalhes do usuário que ocupa a mesa'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único do usuário'
          example: 'user_1'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome completo do usuário'
          example: 'Carlos Silva'
    OccupiedHotDesk:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre uma mesa hot-desk ocupada'
      properties:
        desk_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador único da mesa'
          example: 'desk_101'
        user:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
        occupied_since:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Data e hora em que a mesa foi ocupada'
          example: '2024-06-12T09:00:00Z'
    FloorPlan:
      type: object
      description: 'Informações sobre o plano do andar com mesas ocupadas'
      properties:
        floor_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador do andar'
          example: 'floor_1'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome do andar'
          example: 'Primeiro Andar'
        layout_image_url:
          type: string
          description: 'URL da imagem do layout do andar'
          example: 'https://coworkspace.example.com/layouts/floor_1.png'
        occupied_hot_desks:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de mesas hot-desk atualmente ocupadas neste andar'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OccupiedHotDesk'
    MeetingRoomReservation:
      type: object
      description: 'Reservas futuras para salas de reunião'
      properties:
        reservation_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identificador da reserva'
          example: 'res_001'
        room_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome da sala de reunião reservada'
          example: 'Sala A'
        reserved_by:
          type: string
          description: 'Nome de quem fez a reserva'
          example: 'Fernanda Lima'
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Início da reserva'
          example: '2024-06-12T14:00:00Z'
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Fim da reserva'
          example: '2024-06-12T15:00:00Z'
        purpose:
          type: string
          description: 'Finalidade da reunião'
          example: 'Reunião de projeto'
    DeskAvailabilityReport:
      type: object
      description: 'Relatório completo de disponibilidade das mesas no espaço coworking'
      properties:
        floor_plans:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista dos planos de cada andar, incluindo mesas ocupadas'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/FloorPlan'
        upcoming_meeting_room_reservations:
          type: array
          description: 'Lista de reservas futuras das salas de reunião'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MeetingRoomReservation'

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Veterinary Clinic Appointment API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Pet:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of the pet for the appointment'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the pet'
          example: 'pet_7890'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the pet'
          example: 'Buddy'
        species:
          type: string
          description: 'Species of the pet'
          example: 'Dog'
        breed:
          type: string
          description: 'Breed of the pet'
          example: 'Golden Retriever'
        weight_kg:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Weight of the pet in kilograms'
          example: 30.5
    Owner:
      type: object
      description: 'Contact information of the pet owner'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the owner'
          example: 'owner_4567'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the owner'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        phone:
          type: string
          description: 'Phone number of the owner'
          example: '+1234567890'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Email address of the owner'
          example: 'jane.doe@example.com'
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of the scheduled procedure'
      properties:
        code:
          type: string
          description: 'Procedure code identifier'
          example: 'PROC001'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Description of the procedure'
          example: 'Annual vaccination'
        duration_minutes:
          type: integer
          description: 'Expected duration of the procedure in minutes'
          example: 20
    AppointmentResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response schema for veterinary clinic appointment details'
      properties:
        appointment_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the appointment'
          example: 'apt_123456'
        scheduled_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Scheduled date and time of the appointment in ISO 8601 format'
          example: '2024-07-01T14:30:00Z'
        pet:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
        owner:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Owner'
        procedure:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Procedure'

openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Artist Profile API
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    Track:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of an individual music track with streaming statistics'
      properties:
        trackId:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the track'
          example: 'track_987'
        title:
          type: string
          description: 'Title of the track'
          example: 'Ocean Breeze'
        durationSeconds:
          type: integer
          description: 'Track duration in seconds'
          example: 215
        streams:
          type: integer
          description: 'Total number of streams for the track'
          example: 1500000
    ConcertDate:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about a single upcoming concert date'
      properties:
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date of the concert in YYYY-MM-DD format'
          example: '2024-07-15'
        venue:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the concert venue'
          example: 'Harmony Hall'
        city:
          type: string
          description: 'City where the concert will take place'
          example: 'New York'
        country:
          type: string
          description: 'Country where the concert will take place'
          example: 'USA'
    ConcertTour:
      type: object
      description: 'Object detailing upcoming concert tour dates'
      properties:
        upcomingDates:
          type: array
          description: 'List of upcoming concert dates'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ConcertDate'
    ArtistProfile:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete artist profile with bio, top streamed tracks, and concert tour info'
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the artist'
          example: 'artist_12345'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Artist name'
          example: 'Sonic Waves'
        biography:
          type: string
          description: 'Brief biography of the artist'
          example: 'Sonic Waves is an electronic music producer known for blending synth-pop and ambient sounds to create immersive sonic experiences.'
        topStreams:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of top streamed tracks for the artist'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Track'
        concertTour:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ConcertTour'
    ArtistProfileResponse:
      type: object
      description: 'Response wrapper for artist profile data'
      properties:
        artistProfile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ArtistProfile'

components:
  schemas:
    UserProfile:

      description: 'Profile details of the wallet user'
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the user'
          example: 'usr_987654321'
        full_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the user'
          example: 'Jane Doe'
        email:
          type: string
          description: 'Email address of the user'
          example: 'jane.doe@example.com'
        phone_number:
          type: string
          description: 'User phone number in international format'
          example: '+15551234567'
    Merchant:
      type: object
      description: 'Merchant information where the transaction occurred'
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the merchant'
          example: 'Whole Foods Market'
        category:
          type: string
          description: 'Category of the merchant or business type'
          example: 'Groceries'
    Transaction:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a single wallet transaction'
      properties:
        transaction_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the transaction'
          example: 'txn_001'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'ISO 8601 datetime when the transaction occurred'
          example: '2024-06-12T14:30:00Z'
        amount:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Transaction amount; negative for debit, positive for credit'
          example: -45.0
        currency:
          type: string
          description: 'ISO 4217 currency code'
          example: 'USD'
        description:
          type: string
          description: 'Brief description of the transaction'
          example: 'Grocery Store Purchase'
        merchant:
          oneOf:
            - $ref: '#/components/schemas/Merchant'
            - type: 'null'
          description: 'Merchant details or null if none'
        status:
          type: string
          description: 'Current status of the transaction'
          example: 'completed'
    WalletStatement:
      type: object
      description: 'Digital wallet statement including user info, balance, and recent transactions'
      properties:
        current_balance:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: 'Current available balance in the wallet'
          example: 1523.75
        user_profile:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserProfile'
        recent_transactions:
          type: array
          description: 'List of recent transactions limited to last 3 entries'
          maxItems: 3
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Transaction'

  title: Hospital Laboratory Test Result

  schemas:
    PatientDemographics:
      type: object
      description: 'Demographics information of the patient'
      properties:
        patient_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the patient'
          example: 'P123456'
        name:
          type: string
          description: 'Full name of the patient'
          example: 'John Doe'
        age:
          type: integer
          description: 'Age of the patient in years'
          example: 45
        gender:
          type: string
          description: 'Biological gender of the patient'
          example: 'Male'

      type: object
      description: 'Normal reference range for a biomarker'
      properties:
        min:
          type: number
          description: 'Minimum normal value'
          example: 13.0
        max:
          type: number
          description: 'Maximum normal value'
          example: 17.0
    BloodBiomarker:
      type: object
      description: 'Single blood biomarker measurement with normal range'
      properties:
        biomarker:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the blood biomarker'
          example: 'Hemoglobin'
        value:
          type: number
          description: 'Measured value of the biomarker'
          example: 13.5
        unit:
          type: string
          description: 'Unit of the biomarker measurement'
          example: 'g/dL'
        normal_range:

        date_signed:

    LaboratoryTestResult:

assistant:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Dental Clinic Patient History
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    ToothChart:
      type: object
      description: 'Anatomical tooth chart detailing specific tooth condition and last exam'
      properties:
        tooth_number:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier number of the tooth'
          example: '14'
        tooth_surface:
          type: string
          description: 'Specific surface of the tooth affected or examined'
          example: 'occlusal'
        condition:
          type: string
          description: 'Current condition observed on the tooth'
          example: 'cavity'
        last_exam_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date when the tooth was last examined'
          example: '2024-04-15'
    Procedure:
      type: object
      description: 'A dental procedure previously performed on the patient'
      properties:
        procedure_name:
          type: string
          description: 'Name of the dental procedure'
          example: 'Root Canal Therapy'
        date_performed:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date the procedure was performed'
          example: '2023-11-20'
        tooth_involved:
          type: string
          description: 'Tooth or region involved in the procedure'
          example: '14'
        notes:
          type: string
          description: 'Additional notes about the procedure'
          example: 'Procedure successful without complications'
    UpcomingCleaningMetadata:
      type: object
      description: 'Nested metadata related to the scheduled cleaning appointment'
      properties:
        cleaning_type:
          type: string
          description: 'Type of cleaning procedure scheduled'
          example: 'standard prophylaxis'
        duration_minutes:
          type: integer
          description: 'Expected duration of the cleaning in minutes'
          example: 45
        clinic_technician_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Identifier of the clinic technician assigned to the cleaning'
          example: 'tech_1789'
    UpcomingCleaningSchedule:
      type: object
      description: 'Details about upcoming scheduled cleanings with nested metadata'
      properties:
        next_cleaning_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: 'Date of the next scheduled cleaning'
          example: '2024-08-01'
        reminder_sent:
          type: boolean
          description: 'Indicates whether a reminder has been sent for the cleaning'
          example: true
        reminder_method:
          type: string
          description: 'Method used to send the reminder'
          example: 'email'
        metadata:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleaningMetadata'
    PatientHistory:
      type: object
      description: 'Complete patient dental history including tooth chart, past procedures, and upcoming cleanings'
      properties:
        tooth_chart:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ToothChart'
        past_procedures:
          type: array
          description: 'Array of past dental procedures performed on patient'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Procedure'
        upcoming_cleanings_schedule:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpcomingCleaningSchedule'
paths: {}

info:
  title: Smart Agriculture Sensor Data
  version: 1.0.0
components:
  schemas:
    WeatherForecast:
      type: object
      description: 'Weather forecast predictions relevant to agriculture'
      properties:
        temperature_c:
          type: number
          description: 'Predicted temperature in degrees Celsius'
          example: 22.4
        humidity_percent:
          type: integer
          description: 'Predicted humidity percentage'
          example: 65
        rain_expected_mm:
          type: number
          description: 'Expected rainfall in millimeters'
          example: 5.2
    IrrigationEvent:
      type: object
      description: 'Details of a single automated irrigation event'
      properties:
        event_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier for the irrigation event'
          example: 'evt_001'
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: 'Timestamp when the irrigation event occurred'
          example: '2024-06-11T06:30:00Z'
        duration_seconds:
          type: integer
          description: 'Duration of the irrigation event in seconds'
          example: 180
        water_volume_liters:
          type: number
          description: 'Volume of water used in liters'
          example: 12.5
    SmartAgriSensorData:
      type: object
      description: 'Current data and event logs from a smart agriculture sensor'
      properties:
        sensor_id:
          type: string
          description: 'Unique identifier of the agriculture sensor'
          example: 'agri_sensor_123'
        soil_moisture:
          type: number
          description: 'Current soil moisture percentage'
          example: 32.7
        weather_forecast:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/WeatherForecast'
        irrigation_events:
          type: array
          description: 'List of recent automated irrigation events'
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/IrrigationEvent'
